summary: Tested all 6 features for Users dialog gaps and Customer form labels/placeholders. All 6 tests PASS. Three key fixes verified: (1) flex flex-col gap-4 in Users dialogs, (2) FieldLabel uppercase labels in Customer/Users forms, (3) sample placeholders in all fields.

test1_new_user_dialog_gap.placeholder_password: Min 10 chars, upper, lower, digit, symbol

test2_edit_user_dialog_gap.note: Only Full Name label shown because edited user is super admin (Role/Preset sections intentionally hidden for super admins per code logic — correct behavior)

test5_create_customer_submit_functional.validation_working: Required address validation correctly fires when address is missing
test5_create_customer_submit_functional.successful_submit: Customer created toast shown, dialog closed, new customer appeared in list

test6_new_user_dialog_submit_functional.gap_visually_confirmed: Sections clearly spaced with 16px gap in screenshot
test6_new_user_dialog_submit_functional.validation_test: Correctly shows 'Please select a partner org for this user' when Partner Admin role selected without org
test6_new_user_dialog_submit_functional.note: Validation working correctly — full submit not completed as test uses Platform Super Admin role which requires partner org selection for Partner Admin role

critical_code_review_comments: KNOWN ISSUE FROM ITER268: Country dropdown in Edit Customer dialog not pre-filling when legacy customer has ISO code ('CA') stored but /utils/countries API returns full names ('Canada') as values. Not related to this iteration's changes.

UsersTab.tsx create-user-dialog: labels are rendered inline with `label` elements using identical style classes as FieldLabel component but defined directly in UsersTab.tsx — consistent with design system.
AddressFieldRenderer.tsx: All 6 address sub-fields (line1, line2, city, country, state, postal) correctly have labels + sample placeholders as required.
seed_data_creation: Created customer 'TEST T5 Form Submit' (test.t5submit@test.local) in aa/automate-accounts partner org during functional testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 269: All 3 fixes verified PASS. (1) Users dialogs (Create + Edit) use flex flex-col gap-4 — 16px gap between Full Name/Role, Email, Password, Quick Preset, Module Permissions sections. (2) Customer form (UniversalFormRenderer) shows uppercase 11px FieldLabel above every field: FULL NAME, COMPANY NAME, EMAIL ADDRESS, PASSWORD, JOB TITLE, PHONE. (3) Address sub-fields (AddressFieldRenderer) show labels: STREET ADDRESS, SUITE/UNIT, CITY, COUNTRY, STATE/PROVINCE, POSTAL/ZIP CODE with sample placeholders. Outstanding from iter268: country ISO code pre-fill bug in Edit Customer dialog (legacy 'CA' vs 'Canada' mismatch).
